name: ct-service-survey
description: ChurchTool Service Survey Tool - Terminumfrage-System für ChurchTools-Dienste

scripts.dev:frontend: npm run sync:env && npm run dev --workspace=@ct-service-survey/frontend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run sync:env && cd packages/backend && func start
scripts.build:all: npm run build:shared && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && cd packages/backend && dotnet clean

author: EaglesJungscharen
